change.final_action: Rejected and code/test changes reverted after prompt verifier failed.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: Stable IDs 220/570 and flat memory; candidate primary min decode 115.089002 tok/s.

checks.result: 512/128 prefill regressed 1958.536 -> 1854.538 tok/s (-5.31%) versus retained decode-policy cache baseline despite stable IDs/memory. 4K prefill was flat/slightly lower; 4K decode +0.098 tok/s was not enough to retain.
